title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ALMERIA, PROVINCE OF LEYTE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3207

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2799, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ALMERIA, PROVINCE OF LEYTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The following places in the Municipality of Almeria, Province of Leyte, are declared as barrios of said municipality, to wit:

Tamarindo as Barrio Tamarindo;

Sampao as Barrio Sampao;

Eyusan as Barrio Eyusan;

Salangi as Barrio Salangi; and

Lo'ok as Barrio Lo'ok.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
